Glycyrrhiza glabra, commonly known as Licorice root, is a plant in the legume family known for its sweet flavor and medicinal properties. The health benefits of Licorice root include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and lower stress levels due to its adaptogenic properties. The bioactive constituents of Licorice root include glycyrrhizin, flavonoids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Licorice root include teas, tinctures, and extracts, which are often used to treat digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory ailments.
